## Summary

Describe the change clearly. Focus on the behavior and motivation, not just the files touched.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Compatibility update
- [ ] Other

## Related Issues

Link any related issues here.

## Example Usage

If this changes the public API or adds new functionality, include a short usage example.

```csharp
// Example usage here
```

## Testing

Explain how this was tested.

- [ ] Built successfully
- [ ] Tested in a sample plugin
- [ ] Tested in game
- [ ] Added or updated documentation

Testing notes:

## Visual Changes

If the change affects UI or visible output, include screenshots or recordings.

## Quality Checks

- [ ] I reviewed the contribution guide
- [ ] I checked analyzer warnings and left an explanation for any intentional exceptions
- [ ] I documented new or changed public behavior
- [ ] I kept the code readable and beginner friendly
